title: OpenCode Cline Mode Plugin Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the opencode-cline-mode plugin

replace_default_agents.description: Whether to replace the default agents with cline-plan and cline-act agents

default_agent.description: The default agent to use when starting a new session

plan_model.description: The model ID to use for the planning agent (e.g., 'claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022')

act_model.description: The model ID to use for the acting agent (e.g., 'claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022')

plan_temperature.description: Temperature setting for the planning agent (0-1, lower = more focused)

act_temperature.description: Temperature setting for the acting agent (0-1, lower = more focused)
